title: How to Buy IOTA (IOTA) — Step-by-Step Guide
content:
IOTA is recognized for its innovative DAG-based architecture, which avoids traditional blockchain fees. As the project continues its development phase, many market participants look to gain exposure for its potential impact on the machine-to-machine economy. | Metric | Details | |

## Why Buy IOTA? IOTA’s primary value proposition is its ability to facilitate microtransactions without fees, positioning it as an ideal candidate for future IoT infrastructure. Compared to other assets, it offers a distinct technological alternative to traditional blockchain-based chains.

## Top Exchange Options Many global centralized exchanges support IOTA. You should check if your preferred exchange lists the IOTA/USD or IOTA/USDT trading pairs, as these often offer the highest liquidity.

## Purchase Tutorial 1. Sign up for a reputable exchange that supports IOTA. 2. Complete your identity verification (KYC). 3. Deposit fiat currency (USD, EUR, etc.) or cryptocurrency into your account. 4. Navigate to the trading dashboard and locate the IOTA pair. 5. Enter your purchase amount and execute a market or limit order. 6. Once processed, your IOTA will appear in your exchange wallet.

## Securing Your Tokens For long-term holdings, using a hardware wallet is generally considered a best practice to mitigate exchange-related risks. Always ensure that your chosen hardware wallet supports the IOTA network and its current token standard. Avoid storing large amounts of capital on centralized exchanges for extended periods.

## Important Risks Investors must be aware of the TokenRadar Risk Score of 8, which classifies IOTA as a high-risk asset. High volatility, regulatory considerations, and technical risks are common in this sector. Ensure you never allocate more capital than you are prepared to lose, as market conditions can shift rapidly.
